B.name: B Building
B.notes: Main academic building. Enter through the Foyer on the 1st floor. Elevator available near Foyer.

H.name: H Building
H.position: northwest side of campus, curved building
H.notes: Curved building on the northwest side. Elevator available. H1-H12 on 1st floor, H21-H29 on 2nd floor.

E.name: E Building
E.position: east-center side of campus, standalone portable classrooms
E.notes: Standalone portable classrooms near the Admin Office and Band room.

Library.description: Inside B Building, 1st floor — enter through the Foyer

Counseling.description: B Building, 2nd floor — take stairs or elevator near the Foyer

Gym.description: Large standalone building on the north side, next to the Lunch Pavilion. Boys and Girls Locker Rooms are attached.

MPR.description: Multi-Purpose Room in the center of campus. Includes the Stage, Weight Room, and D1.

Lunch Pavilion.position: north side of campus, next to Gym
Lunch Pavilion.description: Standalone building on the north side next to the Gym. Includes Kitchen and Restrooms.

Band.description: Standalone Band room on the east side of campus, near E Building.

Office.description: Main Admin area on the southeast side. Includes Principal, Asst. Principal, Health room, and Student Activities.

Boys Locker Room.description: Attached to the Gym on the north side of campus

Girls Locker Room.description: Attached to the Gym on the north side of campus

Weight Room.description: Inside the MPR building, center of campus

Stage.description: Inside the MPR building, center of campus

Foyer.description: Main entrance area of B Building, 1st floor

subject_locations.Electives: Any building — elective classes can be located throughout campus

navigation_notes: H Building is the large curved building on the northwest side.
B Building is on the west side and contains the Library (1F) and Counseling (2F).
The Gym and Lunch Pavilion are side by side on the north side.
The MPR (Multi-Purpose Room) is in the center of campus.
E Building portable classrooms are near the Admin Office on the east-center side.
The Band room is on the far east side of campus.
The Admin Office (Principal, Asst. Principal, Health) is on the southeast side.
Most buildings have restrooms (RR) marked on the map.
You cannot cut through between B Building and the Office/E Building — to travel between them, you must go around the MPR and through the main quad.
